title: taraxacum latihastatum
intro: Taraxacum latihastatum, also known as the broad-leaved dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve liver and kidney issues, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum latihastatum include reducing inflammation, improving blood sugar control, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
